name: recrest
description: Recrest — A lightweight developer dashboard built with Tauri.

scripts.dev: yarn workspace @recrest/shared build && yarn workspace @recrest/app tauri:dev
scripts.dev:web: yarn workspace @recrest/shared build && yarn workspace @recrest/app dev
scripts.build: yarn workspace @recrest/shared build && yarn workspace @recrest/app tauri:build
scripts.format: yarn workspace @recrest/shared format && yarn workspace @recrest/app format && yarn workspace @recrest/tests format
scripts.format:check: yarn workspace @recrest/shared format:check && yarn workspace @recrest/app format:check && yarn workspace @recrest/tests format:check
scripts.lint: yarn workspace @recrest/shared lint && yarn workspace @recrest/app lint && yarn workspace @recrest/tests lint
scripts.test: yarn workspace @recrest/shared test && yarn workspace @recrest/app test
scripts.test:ts: yarn workspace @recrest/shared test:ts && yarn workspace @recrest/app test:ts && yarn workspace @recrest/tests test:ts
scripts.typecheck: yarn workspace @recrest/shared typecheck && yarn workspace @recrest/app typecheck && yarn workspace @recrest/tests typecheck
